Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Replace git-based pipeline discovery with Airflow-sourced metadata

- Remove git clone/pull/AST-parse pipeline entirely \(git_client, etl_code_parser, git_service, git_pull_task\)
- Remove DAG network model/service/router/schema and frontend counterparts
- Add AirflowSyncService that discovers pipelines from Airflow task op_kwargs \(category, schedule, needs, prefers\)
- Source destination tables from task logs \(ETL_WRITES_TO lines\) via AST-parsed SUFFIXES constants in ETL files
- Add get_task_log method to Airflow client with serve-logs support in scheduler container
- Add pipeline topology endpoint with clickable DAG filter \(dag_id query param\)
- Add consumers, usage, and topology routers/services/schemas
- Add 4 DAG files \(nightfall_revenue, pulse_360, atlas_intelligence, watchtower\) with AST-based run_etl
- Add 7 new ETL seed files with SUFFIXES constants for varied destination table counts
- Add task config files under dev/dags/daily/ and dev/dags/hourly/
- Add Alembic migrations: pipeline_usages table, drop dag_networks, drop code_path
- Mount ETL code in Airflow containers, add WEBSERVER__SECRET_KEY for log auth
- Update frontend: remove category from registry/header, show ETL/API labels, docstring descriptions
- Update LineageTopology: writes-to footer, clickable DAG badges, remove reads-from display
- APIs \(billing_reports_api, customer_insights_api\) excluded from writes_to edges

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Replace git pipeline with Airflow-sourced metadata and log-based lineage" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- **Remove git clone/pull/AST-parse pipeline** — all pipeline metadata now sourced from Airflow task `op_kwargs` and task logs
- **Log-based destination table discovery** — `run_etl` reads `SUFFIXES` from ETL files via AST, logs `ETL_WRITES_TO:` lines; backend parses logs via Airflow REST API
- **4 DAG networks** \(nightfall_revenue, pulse_360, atlas_intelligence, watchtower\) with 13 ETL/API pipelines across varied dependency depths
- **Clickable DAG filter** on Pipeline Topology — click a DAG badge to see statuses scoped to that DAG's run
- **UI cleanup** — registry cards show ETL/API labels, detail view shows docstring descriptions, category badge removed, writes-to footer replaces reads-from
- **New features** — consumers, usage, and topology endpoints; pipeline_usages table; seed usage data

## Test plan
- [ ] `docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build` — all containers start healthy
- [ ] Unpause and trigger all 4 DAGs — all succeed
- [ ] Restart backend — `Synced 13 pipelines from Airflow` in logs
- [ ] Registry cards show "ETL" or "API" labels, not categories
- [ ] Selecting a pipeline shows docstring description in header
- [ ] API pipelines \(Billing Reports Api, Customer Insights Api\) have no Writes To tables
- [ ] ETL pipelines show correct destination table counts \(e.g. Shopify=8, Executive KPI=20\)
- [ ] Clicking DAG badges in topology filters upstream/downstream to that DAG
- [ ] Postgres Production Db shows 3 DAGs — clicking each shows different downstream

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
